Language: dockerfile
A simple WhatsApp bot to manage groups

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TechHutTV/homelab
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TechHutTV/homelab
Language: dockerfile
Homelab stacks, templates, and more fun resources!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: autowarefoundation/autoware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/autowarefoundation/autoware
Language: dockerfile
Autoware - the world's leading open-source software project for autonomous driving

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/vibe-vibe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/vibe-vibe
Language: dockerfile
AI for All: The First Systematic Vibe Coding Tutorial | From Zero to Full-Stack, Bring Your Ideas to Life | Live at: www.vibevibe.cn ；全民AI学习第一课，首个系统化 Vibe Coding 开源教程 | 零基础到全栈实战，让人人都能借助 AI 实现自己的想法与创意 | 在线地址：www.vibevibe.cn

ns0:entry.ns0:title: linuxserver/docker-swag
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/linuxserver/docker-swag
Language: dockerfile
Nginx webserver and reverse proxy with php support and a built-in Certbot (Let's Encrypt) client. It also contains fail2ban for intrusion prevention.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
Language: dockerfile
Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oxsecurity/megalinter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oxsecurity/megalinter
Language: dockerfile
🦙 MegaLinter analyzes 50 languages, 22 formats, 21 tooling formats, excessive copy-pastes, spelling mistakes and security issues in your repository sources with a GitHub Action, other CI tools or locally.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: piyushsachdeva/CKA-2024
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/piyushsachdeva/CKA-2024
Language: dockerfile
This repository contains the notes and code snippets of the CKA 2025 YouTube Playlist. The content is based on the latest 2025 curriculum and includes hands-on demos, assignments, and exam-based scenarios. I will be covering everything from the basics to the advanced level.
